Plaintiffs Notice, Motion, Application For And Request For Default Prove Up Hearing And Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-20-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Pancy Chow.
Dept. 514. Judge: Newton Lam. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703. Email: mlyon@sftc.org.

Denise A. Leadbetter, Esq. appeared for plaintiff 802-810 Green Street, LLC.
Gregory Wimmer, Managing Member of the LLC, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Pancy Chow.
Order GRANTING plaintiff's request to reclassify this matter from a limited unlawful detainer action, to an unlimited contract action, was filed on September 13, 2018.
Plaintiff's amended complaint for Breach of Contract/Common Counts was filed on September 13, 2018 and personally served on defendant Pancy Chow on September 15, 2018.
Default as to defendant Pancy Chow was entered on October 16, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on December 5, 2018.
Plaintiff filed a dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Green Corner Cleaners on June 4, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff 802-810 Green Street, LLC, and against the Defaulted Defendant Pancy Chow, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $25,489.50.
Prejudgment Interest - $6,704.09.
Attorney Fees - $14,123.50.
